title: IDEA Democracy Assessment Framework — Aspect Map
description: Codebook of democracy aspects used by the AI x Democracy Threat Map. Keyed by aspect code (e.g. '2.1'). Each entry describes one leaf-level aspect within a pillar of the IDEA framework.

code.description: Numeric code matching the object key, e.g. '2.1'

name.description: Short name of the aspect, e.g. 'Free and Fair Elections'

definition.description: One-line definition (1-2 sentences). Starts with 'Effects on...' by convention.

pillar.description: Full name of the parent pillar, e.g. 'Representative and Accountable Government'

pillarCode.description: Numeric pillar code, e.g. '2'. Must match the integer part of the aspect code.

description.description: Full description (1-3 sentences). More detailed than the definition. Explains the scope and nuance of this aspect.
